scenario.context: Station 05: prepare the specifications document, procurement planning, and acceptance-ready requirements.
scenario.mission: You turn the need into clear requirements and create a comparable basis for procurement.

constraints: Keep acceptance in mind from the start

customerRequest.subject: Station 05: Specifications and procurement
customerRequest.body: Please prepare the specifications document and a short procurement basis for network provisioning.

questions.title: From need to procurement
questions.prompt: Put the steps up to a comparable tender in order.
items: Confirm the need and goals from the requirements specification
Define acceptance criteria and must-have points
Provide the documents for vendor release
correctOrder: Confirm the need and goals from the requirements specification
Define acceptance criteria and must-have points
Provide the documents for vendor release

feedback.correct: Correct: Need, specifications, and procurement are linked sensibly.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please build from need to requirements, acceptance, and then procurement.

questions.title: Separate requirements
questions.prompt: Which statements fit a clean separation of functional and non-functional requirements? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Functional requirements describe services such as address assignment or site coupling
Non-functional requirements describe qualities such as availability or response time
options.rationale: That is typical for quality characteristics.

options.text: Non-functional requirements do not need to be measurable
Acceptance criteria should be directly derivable from requirements
Requirements can intentionally remain vague so vendors can be creative
options.rationale: That makes comparison and acceptance harder.

feedback.correct: Correct: The separation is technically clean and acceptance-ready.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: Please pay clearer attention to measurability and derivability.

questions.title: Recognize procurement criterion
questions.prompt: Which criterion is most useful for a fair vendor evaluation?

options.text: The vendor should simply seem as likable as possible
options.rationale: That is subjective and hardly testable.

options.text: Define measurable criteria for performance, operations, security, and service
options.rationale: This makes offers comparable and justifiable.

options.text: Automatically prefer the first offer received
options.rationale: That would not be technically sound.

feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Procurement decisions must be traceable and sound.

questions.title: Derive specifications from the requirements document
questions.prompt: Describe in 4-6 sentences how you would develop a technical specifications document with acceptance reference from the requirements document.
questions.expectedOutline: Derivation of a technical implementation document from need and acceptance criteria.

feedback.correct: Correct: The path from requirements document to specifications document is coherent.
feedback.wrong: Please link need, technical concretization, and acceptance more closely.

questions.title: Calculate the scoring scheme
questions.prompt: A scoring scheme includes 5 functional mandatory criteria with weight 3, 4 non-functional mandatory criteria with weight 2, and 6 optional criteria with weight 1. How many weighted points does the scheme have in total?

feedback.wrong: Please combine the number of criteria and the weighting correctly.
